但係幫手補充下
嗰支.38左輪黎, 本身左輪就係好難走火所以警方採用

左輪大部分型號都冇保險制(safety), 警方嗰支都冇, 所以設計上係要比較大力先可以拉郁trigger 開槍
另加專業訓練係手指未開槍唔會放係trigger, 所以呢單野好難係走火

另加重點真係佢拎槍衝向人之餘, 佢係一個人行動, 絕對係有問題

請廣傳
<This is not self-defense>
Many of you may say, when the protests are threatening the police's life, the police have the right to use force (gunfire) for self-defense.
 
Looking into the video, the police was holding the gun pointing and proceeding to the protesters, which is an offensive move, instead of defending himself by falling back. When you have the choice to dismiss the protesters, using baton or firing a warning shot, he chose pointing the gun towards the protesters this is not self-defense.
 
Firing bullet towards protesters is foreseeable since the Police dehumanize the protesters by labeling them as cockroaches or calling them as objects. This dehumanization act has let the Police feel nothing but hate towards the protesters, making them as enemies, someone to be defeated.
 
This is what the police wanted to do, holding the gun, pointing to protesters, stepping forward, put himself in danger and acquire the excuse to make the shot.
